description_long: This object represents an adult human figure with elongated limbs and a slender build, depicted in a dynamic, forward-leaning posture. The arms and legs are extended, with one leg bent at the knee and the other stretched behind, suggesting a running or sprinting motion. The body is stylized, with exaggerated proportions and minimal anatomical detail, giving it an abstract, artistic appearance. The surface appears smooth and uniform, with no visible clothing details or accessories. The feet are pointed, and the hands are not distinctly modeled, blending into the arms. The overall form is streamlined, emphasizing movement and energy.
description: A stylized adult human figure in a dynamic running pose, with elongated limbs and a smooth, abstract surface.
description_view_0: The figure is seen from above and slightly to the side, highlighting the bent leg and the forward-leaning torso.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the extended rear leg and the outstretched arm, showcasing the running motion.
description_view_2: A low side angle reveals the length of the limbs and the streamlined body, with the bent leg clearly visible.
description_view_3: The figure is viewed from behind and below, accentuating the stretched rear leg and the dynamic posture.
attribute_posture: running with one leg bent and arms extended
